examples: He witnessed the impressive rites of the paschal service.
He interpreted for us the paschal mystery as a mystery of divine mercy.
Christ is still at the table on which the paschal supper has been spread.

But Patrick defied convention, lighting a paschal (Easter) fire on the Hill of Slane, near today's village of Slane, located about 16km northeast of Tara.
